message:
feat(policy): extend namespace isolation to connector execution contexts and credentials

Add tenant-scoped connector operations (register_bundle_in_namespace,
check_credential_namespace) and 11 new tests covering all resource types
(pane, connector, workflow, credential), hierarchical parent-to-child access,
all 6 connector action kinds, bundle registration with namespace binding,
and two e2e scenarios (multi-tenant isolation + failure recovery).
PolicyEngine now has 417 passing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
